creator: brouwer@annejan.com
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #2)

The weird thing is, this is the output from svn diff, I even tried with a clean checkout with the following steps:

svn co https://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head/sysutils/qtpass
cd qtpass
cp ~/updating/qtpass/Makefile .
cp ~/updating/qtpass/distinfo .
svn diff | mail update@annejan.com

The # $FreeBSD$ you mention is the first line of the Makefile.
